default.name: opus
commands: source C:/Users/andre/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate pi && pi-link opus@clankpad

default.name: gpt
commands: source C:/Users/andre/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate pi && pi-link gpt@clankpad

default.name: committer
commands: source C:/Users/andre/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate pi && pi --session $(pi-link resolve committer@clankpad)
